# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: web-app-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  port: 8080
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web-app
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  port: 8081
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: product-service-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  port: 8082
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: product-service
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payment-service-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  port: 8083
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: web-app-to-user-service-auth
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-server
  client:
    authenticated:
      serviceAccounts:
      - name: web-app
        namespace: default
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: web-app-to-product-service-auth
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: product-service-server
  client:
    authenticated:
      serviceAccounts:
      - name: web-app
        namespace: default
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: user-service-to-payment-service-auth
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: payment-service-server
  client:
    authenticated:
      serviceAccounts:
      - name: user-service
        namespace: default
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: product-service-to-payment-service-auth
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: payment-service-server
  client:
    authenticated:
      serviceAccounts:
      - name: product-service
        namespace: default
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: internal-tool-to-user-service-auth
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-server
  client:
    authenticated:
      serviceAccounts:
      - name: internal-tool
        namespace: default
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: internal-tool-to-product-service-auth
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: product-service-server
  client:
    authenticated:
      serviceAccounts:
      - name: internal-tool
        namespace: default
